videos.title: HTML Colors - freeCodeCamp
videos.description: Learn about HTML colors including named colors, hex codes, RGB, and HSL values with practical examples.

videos.title: CSS Colors Explained - Kevin Powell
videos.description: Kevin Powell explains how colors work in CSS, covering hex, RGB, HSL, and accessibility considerations.

videos.title: HTML Color Codes Tutorial - Web Dev Simplified
videos.description: A comprehensive guide to HTML and CSS color formats including hex, rgba, hsla, and color naming.

videos.title: HTML Crash Course - Colors - Traversy Media
videos.description: Brad Traversy covers HTML color usage including inline styles, CSS, and different color value formats.

videos.title: Color Theory for Web Design - freeCodeCamp
videos.description: Learn color theory fundamentals and how to apply them to create visually appealing web designs.
